Quantitative: The term "Work-life balance", i.e. the absence of conflict between the professional and personal life of an employee, is significantly influenced by factors related to both work and family status. The term is mainly used to describe the situation in the relationship / balance between a person's responsibilities in professional life (public) and private life (family) and, therefore, it is impossible to have the same meaning for everyone. The purpose of this paper is to present and analyze the issue of “Work-life balance” of employees, especially during the financial crisis.
